achievable_daily_noi_usd.rationale: Required floor is $50k/day. A 999-guest VIP venue at high-roller spend can plausibly clear it, but Expert Criticism flags T2CA vetting friction and 60/40 split dilution as binding downside drivers, so low falls well below floor.

political_reversal_shock_usd.rationale: CAPEX-class shock: site remediation plus legal costs over $10M cited in Risk 1; base anchored on the $90M reserve the plan ring-fences for this scenario; lognormal preferred but sampler unavailable.

relocation_blackout_days.rationale: Plan commits to a 7-day blackout; Data Collection 2 caps the assumption at 8 calendar days with medium confidence, and Issue 2 sensitivity tests a 2-week slip from logistics failures.

ancillary_gross_revenue_annual_usd.rationale: Review plan derives ~$2B annual gross from $50M/month at ~30% margin; ancillary revenue with downside from political backlash and upside from VIP capture; lognormal preferred but sampler unavailable.

ancillary_margin_fraction.rationale: Review plan benchmarks 30% margin for ancillary hospitality; comparable luxury hospitality operations typically run 15-45% net margin depending on labor and security overhead.
